mapper.select: select * from reading_passage where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select * from reading_passage where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 0 order by id asc
select * from reading_passage where test_id = #{testId} order by id asc
mapper.update: update reading_passage set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update reading_passage set is_deleted = 1 where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 0
update reading_passage set is_deleted = 0 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
update reading_passage set is_deleted = 0 where test_id = #{testId} and is_deleted = 1
